zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Littleton於1357年1月1日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton23歲，母親Julian de Somery22歲。他於1394年與Maud Quartermain在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年1月1日在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年65歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利。

nameMeanings.name: Littleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, mostly in southwestern England, named in Old English as ‘small settlement’, from lȳtel ‘small’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Littleton was born on 1 January 1357, in Devon, England, his father, Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, was 23 and his mother, Julian de Somery, was 22. He married Maud Quartermain in 1394, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 1 January 1422, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Frankley, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Littleton est né le 1 janvier 1357, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Julian de Somery, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maud Quartermain en 1394, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1422, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Littleton am 1. Januar 1357 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton 23 und seine Mutter Julian de Somery 22. Er hat 1394 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Maud Quartermain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1422 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Frankley, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Littleton è nato il il 1 gennaio 1357 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Julian de Somery, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maud Quartermain nel 1394, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1422, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Frankley, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Littletonが1357年1月1日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonは23歳，母Julian de Someryは22歳であった。1394年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでMaud Quartermainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年1月1日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで65歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Littleton(이)가 1357년 1월 1일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian de Somery(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Maud Quartermain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 1월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에 묻혔다.

pt.Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, England: Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Littleton nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1357, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Julian de Somery, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Quartermain em 1394, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1422, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Littleton родился 1 января 1357 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Julian de Somery, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Quartermain в 1394 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 1 января 1422 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Quartermain en 1394, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
